Now Live: P_POWELLK26 Contract Settled at 0%
Sun, 17 May 2026 16:00:00 GMT
https://www.bitmex.com/blog/p_powellk26_settlement
By the terms stated in the P_POWELLK26 Settlement Event, P_POWELLK26 contract was settled at 0% at 02:00 UTC on 18 May 2026. As Jerome Powell did not resign and held his position as Chairman of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve until the end of his term on 15 May 2026, the P_POWELLK26 contract should payout at 0%. In the meantime, if you have any questions please contact Support .
